startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Catalog pages to start crawling from.

includeWaybackSeeds.title: Include Wayback URL seeds
includeWaybackSeeds.description: Adds known /Member URLs from the Wayback CDX index so the crawl remains resilient to frontend changes.

waybackSeedLimit.title: Wayback seed limit
waybackSeedLimit.description: Maximum number of /Member URLs loaded from Wayback.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max requests per crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Hard stop to contain blast radius and control runtime costs.
